[minta](https://minta.framer.ai/#hero)

[Features](https://minta.framer.ai/#features)

[App](https://minta.framer.ai/#mobile-app)

[Card](https://minta.framer.ai/#card-section)

[Security](https://minta.framer.ai/#security)

[Pricing](https://minta.framer.ai/pricing)

[Get Access](https://minta.framer.ai/waitlist)

# Stepintothelight.Yourfutureisalreadywaiting.

MintaistheAI-poweredcryptowalletthatguidesyoufromyourfirstdollartoyourfirstthousand.

[Get Early Access](https://minta.framer.ai/waitlist)

![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/QJ7xTHJiLIy10SScnMIVYh9eHA.jpg?width=2854&height=1632)

Stepintothelight.

Yourfutureisalreadywaiting.

$0K+

$0K+

People already joined

0+

0+

Countries supported

$0

$0

Hidden fees

0.0

0.0

Early access rating

![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/WlXqktLcjLyhxLM2ikcJZ1GjQpQ.png?width=2862&height=1632)

What Minta does

## One app. Three superpowers.

Everything you need to own, spend, and grow crypto — guided by AI.

![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/aylEDkAHTOhVTL25lhQ1WbXzzU.png?width=880&height=800)

Send & receive, instantly

BTC, ETH, USDC and more. Send to anyone, anywhere, your AI flags anything unusual before you confirm.

![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/rF1CV4z9XJES4inFKqFgvxvI0bY.png?width=880&height=800)

Spend crypto like cash

Your Minta Card works everywhere Visa does. Pay in any currency, settle in crypto. Zero foreign exchange fees.

![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/gCXlpLxcLujN8cdPcTeyiUTabzU.png?width=880&height=800)

Grow while you sleep

Set a goal, let Minta AI handle the rest. Flexible or locked — your yield, always transparent.

Minta AI

## Your guide, every step.

Most crypto apps leave you alone. Minta doesn't.

![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/shjqhuJZaqBxu3LNqCqqygnNM.png?width=2912&height=1632)

Minta

Your AI companion explains every move in plain English, flags risks before they happen, and learns your habits over time. The more you use Minta, the smarter it gets.

Understands plain English

Ask anything. No jargon, no documentation, no guesswork.

Flags risks before they happen

Unusual transaction? Suspicious address? Minta warns you first.

Learns your habits

The longer you use Minta, the more personalized your experience becomes.

[Get Early Access](https://minta.framer.ai/waitlist)

Getting started

## From zero to crypto. In minutes.

No experience needed. Minta guides you through every step.

04 · Start living with crypto

Spend, save, send. Your AI is with you at every move.

03 · Add your first funds

Bank transfer or card. Safe, instant, transparent.

02 · Meet your AI

Answer 3 simple questions. Minta personalizes everything.

01 · Create your account

Verify your Email and phone number. That's it.

Available now

## The whole experience, in your pocket.

Designed for iOS and Android. Fast, fluid, and built around you.

![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/phm5FX1McnnVyhSv1WBiiGPKA.png?width=861&height=1767)

Instant notifications

Every move, every update — in real time.

Your keys, your crypto

Non-custodial by default. Only you control your funds.

Biometric login

Unlock instantly with Face ID or fingerprint.

Minta Card

## One card. Every currency.

Physical and virtual. Accepted everywhere Visa is.

minta

![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/5WG7N5HA4rBuaonFVfti8G7TxE.png?width=565&height=384)

Alex McArthur

![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/TqpeEXuxz5eCT9kOPqj8UlQBVas.jpeg?width=5824&height=3264)

minta

![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/5WG7N5HA4rBuaonFVfti8G7TxE.png?width=565&height=384)

Sophie Hagan

![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/q3gTUOBoxKAobXGtZtKxUomvqTc.jpeg?width=6166&height=3456)

minta

![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/5WG7N5HA4rBuaonFVfti8G7TxE.png?width=565&height=384)

James Morris

![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/xa6T7vk5deD5eQuASCT4wqR1agg.jpeg?width=7680&height=4304)

Spend crypto anywhere

Use your Minta Card at 80M+ merchants worldwide.

Instant currency conversion

Minta converts your crypto automatically, at the best rate.

Zero foreign exchange fees

No hidden fees, no surprises. What you see is what you pay.

Early access voices

## People who stepped in first.

![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/xNmy1ns8x2UY0U6cUUL9nPhNuQ.png?width=2400&height=1600)

I tried three crypto apps before Minta. This is the first one I actually understood.

Sophie R.

Paris

![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/dIqWMSFlxBcAlvNphHNWKJNr5n4.png?width=2400&height=2400)

The AI caught a suspicious transaction I would have missed. Saved me $400.

Marcus T.

Berlin

![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/bOEubB1ljgFPqRzR62Hmfa2RhE.png?width=976&height=673)

Minta Card worked in Tokyo, Lisbon, and Buenos Aires without a single issue.

Aisha K.

London

![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/OUdENV0880roGJHy7ZH8U8LBNE.png?width=1803&height=1435)

Finally a wallet that doesn't make me feel stupid.

Elena V.

Amsterdam

![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/hgX8bqRzphlgCwGAH05jdYK5vE.png?width=1600&height=1343)

I set up my savings goal in 2 minutes. Didn't touch it since. It just works."

Liam C.

Toronto

![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/xNmy1ns8x2UY0U6cUUL9nPhNuQ.png?width=2400&height=1600)

I tried three crypto apps before Minta. This is the first one I actually understood.

Sophie R.

Paris

![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/XqEZYbOUx1WNuBA5fyhQKHXICvs.jpg?width=2878&height=1632)

Security

## Your money is safe here.

Security isn't a feature — it's the foundation.

Bank-grade encryption

Your data and funds are protected by 256-bit encryption, end to end.

SOC 2 Type II certified

Independently audited. Held to the highest security standards.

Non-custodial by default

Your keys, your crypto. Minta never holds your funds.

FAQ

## Everything you need to know.

Still have questions? We've got answers.

Do I need crypto experience to use Minta?

Is my money safe with Minta?

How does the Minta Card work?

What cryptocurrencies does Minta support?

How does Minta AI protect me?

When will Minta be available?

## Step into the light. Your future is already waiting.

Join 12,400 people already building their financial future with Minta.

[Get Early Access](https://minta.framer.ai/waitlist)

[minta](https://minta.framer.ai/#hero)

Track every move, analyze your performance, and get real-time coaching.

__llm_logo_reasoning.reasoning: None of the candidates clearly match the brand 'Minta' as seen in the header. The heuristic choice was a large hero image, not a logo.

primary.reasoning: The button 'Get Early Access' is likely the primary CTA due to its action-oriented text, which suggests immediate engagement with the product.

secondary.reasoning: The button 'Subscribe' serves as a secondary action, typically used for less immediate engagement, such as receiving updates.

rawLogoSelection.selectedLogoReasoning: None of the candidates clearly match the brand 'Minta' as seen in the header. The heuristic choice was a large hero image, not a logo.

metadata.description: Minta is a premium Framer template for fintech apps, crypto wallets, neobanks, and digital banking products. Dark mode, AI-powered design, conversion-optimized.

json.company_description: Minta is the AI-powered crypto wallet that guides you from your first dollar to your first thousand. It offers various features, including sending and receiving cryptocurrencies, spending crypto like cash with the Minta Card, and growing savings with transparent yield management.

formState.extractPrompt: Extract the company details, following the schema.
